perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair is in a Costco warehouse, standing in front of a refrigerated shelf. She reaches out and picks up a red package of Johnsonville 'Hot & Spicy' sausages. (2) The scene shifts to a bright indoor setting where the same woman and another woman wearing a blue beret are sitting at a table. They hold the sausage package close to the camera and point at the sausages. (3) The women are seen eating the sausages with forks. One woman covers her mouth in a surprised, positive reaction. They continue to talk and gesture enthusiastically while holding the package and showing a cooked sausage on a plate.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy pop music plays with female vocals chanting 'Sausage, sausage, really delicious' in Mandarin. (2) The music continues at a lower volume as a female voice provides an enthusiastic narration/review. (3) Sound effects like 'pop' and 'ding' occur alongside text animations. The voices of two women are heard discussing the spice level, texture, and price of the product in a friendly and excited tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. Functional Text: '香腸真的好吃' (Sausage is really delicious) scrolls across. (2) Decorative Text: '超級實播' (Super live broadcast), '墨西哥辣椒香腸' (Mexican Chili Sausage) in bold, colorful fonts. (3) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the dialogue about spiciness and '9分' (9 points) rating. End text '不讓你失望' (Won't let you down) with a thumbs-up emoji.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping Intro -> Product Identification -> Comparative Tasting -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator in store, 2 female creators at the table, 1 female passerby in the store background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one with long black hair wearing a black and white top, the other with shorter hair wearing a grey top and a blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First part shows Costco warehouse aisles with red boxes of sausages; second part shows a clean room with a table, food items, and soft home decor.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Store Discovery -> Detailed Review -> Rating -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review the 'Johnsonville Hot & Spicy Mexican Sausage' sold at Costco. The video uses a lifestyle vlog format to demonstrate the product's packaging, cooking convenience, and taste profile (juiciness and spice) to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of brand logos, positive taste reaction, and detailed product specifications including price.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of dynamic text overlays and fast-paced editing typical of food-tasting short videos.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media format for retail discovery, focusing on 'new' or 'popular' warehouse club items.
